import io
import string
import list

fn join_ints(_ nums: List<Int>) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < nums.len()
    let n = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == 0
      result = "#{n}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{n}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)

  mut evens: List<Int> = []
  mut odds: List<Int> = []

  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let token = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(n)
      if n % 2 == 0
        evens = list.push(evens, n)
      else
        odds = list.push(odds, n)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("evens=#{join_ints(evens)}")
  println("odds=#{join_ints(odds)}")

  Ok(())
end
